creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: I'm running 12.0-BETA2 r339783 GENERIC  amd64 from the stable/12 branch. I do have qt5-quick-5.12.0.b3 installed. And for what it may be worth, I found this old bug from 2014 that may be at least tangentially related. I tried the environment variable to no avail: https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/ubuntu-ui-toolkit/+bug/1281237
